data.name: Keiko-san (47) my co-worker, is a single mother
data.detailed_description: An adult visual novel game and its hentai game with full animation, tells the story of a widowed woman named "Tanaka-Keiko". she was abandoned by her husband, and her daughter chose to follow him. Due to living alone and experiencing economic problems, Keiko has to work at a mini market that almost went bankrupt because there were no customers. A teenage man also works at the mini market, the man named Fujimoto-Arata with a handsome face and a stocky body, this is where the co-workers met.
data.about_the_game: An adult visual novel game and its hentai game with full animation, tells the story of a widowed woman named "Tanaka-Keiko". she was abandoned by her husband, and her daughter chose to follow him. Due to living alone and experiencing economic problems, Keiko has to work at a mini market that almost went bankrupt because there were no customers. A teenage man also works at the mini market, the man named Fujimoto-Arata with a handsome face and a stocky body, this is where the co-workers met.
data.short_description: An adult visual novel game with full animation, tells the story of a widowed woman named "Tanaka-Keiko". she was abandoned by her husband, and her daughter chose to follow him. because of economic problems, Keiko has to work at a mini market, and met a young man named Fujimoto-Arata.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10
  • 處理器: core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1.2 GHz
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: in some cases sometimes require a graphics card that exceeds the minimum requirement.
